sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n13997" key="a)po/tegma" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀπότεγμα</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ατος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">τίκτω</etym>) <sense id="n13997.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">product,</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">νοῦ καὶ λόγου</foreign> Sophon. <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">in de An.</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0627.tlg023:52:30" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">52.30</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
